text.div: intentionally left empty / not meaningful

tr.td: 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
NDA021457 200 ACTUAT albuterol 0.09 MG/ACTUAT Metered Dose Inhaler [ProAir]
2 actuations (180 mcg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
Transfusion of packed red blood cells
Abnormal findings diagnostic imaging heart+coronary circulat (finding)

ul.li: Achieve LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL for secondary prevention in ischemic heart disease.
Maintain total cholesterol below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain HDL cholesterol above 40 mg/dL.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 6.5% through lifestyle modification and self-management.
Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight as part of diabetes prevention plan.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg as part of cardiovascular risk reduction in prediabetes.
Maintain LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Patient will receive education on lifestyle changes to help manage blood pressure, including diet, exercise, and sodium reduction.
Patient will demonstrate understanding of asthma self-management strategies, including inhaler technique, trigger avoidance, and action plan adherence.
Patient will report no more than 2 days per week with asthma symptoms.
Patient will use rescue inhaler no more than 2 times per week.
Patient will have zero asthma-related emergency department visits or hospitalizations in the next 12 months.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

ul.li: Achieve LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL for secondary prevention in ischemic heart disease.
Maintain total cholesterol below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain HDL cholesterol above 40 mg/dL.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 6.5% through lifestyle modification and self-management.
Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight as part of diabetes prevention plan.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg as part of cardiovascular risk reduction in prediabetes.
Maintain LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Patient will receive education on lifestyle changes to help manage blood pressure, including diet, exercise, and sodium reduction.
Patient will demonstrate understanding of asthma self-management strategies, including inhaler technique, trigger avoidance, and action plan adherence.
Patient will report no more than 2 days per week with asthma symptoms.
Patient will use rescue inhaler no more than 2 times per week.
Patient will have zero asthma-related emergency department visits or hospitalizations in the next 12 months.
